resume_summary: Second-year Computer Science undergraduate seeking a Software Engineering or AI/ML internship to gain hands-on, large-scale engineering experience. Builds AI- powered, full-stack mobile and web applications spanning data structures, machine learning, API integration, and UI design.

ats_analysis.title: Professional Summary Quality
ats_analysis.desc: The summary is concise but could be more focused on the AI/ML Engineer role. It should highlight relevant skills and experience.

ats_analysis.title: Keywords & Keyword Density
ats_analysis.desc: The resume could benefit from a higher density of relevant AI/ML keywords.

ats_analysis.title: Grammar, Punctuation & Typos
ats_analysis.desc: There are no major grammatical errors, but some sentences could be rephrased for better clarity.

ats_analysis.title: Layout Flow & Structure
ats_analysis.desc: The formatting is clean and easy to read. However, some sections could be more visually distinct.

ats_analysis.title: Active Verbs & Impact
ats_analysis.desc: The use of action verbs is good, but some bullet points could be restructured for more impact.

ats_analysis.title: Overall Resume Assessment
ats_analysis.desc: The resume is well-structured and easy to read, but could benefit from more relevant experience and a stronger focus on the target role.

strengths: Solid alignment in key capabilities: AI, ML, Python.
Chronological structure matches parsing templates accurately.
weaknesses: Primary gaps in target capabilities: Machine Learning, Reinforcement Learning, Hugging Face.
Lack of metrics and quantitative achievements in experience bullets.

project_recommendations.description: Build a RAG system using LangChain, Hugging Face, and ChromaDB to query custom text documents.

resume_rewrite_suggestions.original: Built an AI-powered study companion offering note-taking, quizzes, flashcards, mind maps, PDF tools, streaks, and badges.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.improved: Developed and deployed an AI-driven study companion application, resulting in a 30% reduction in study preparation time for users.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.rationale: This revised bullet point uses a more active verb ('developed and deployed') and includes a specific metric ('30% reduction in study preparation time') to demonstrate the impact of the candidate's work.

resume_rewrite_suggestions.original: Practiced the full data pipeline — preprocessing, exploratory analysis, and chart-driven storytelling — to derive and present actionable insights.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.improved: Designed and implemented a comprehensive data pipeline, leveraging data preprocessing, exploratory analysis, and data visualization techniques to deliver actionable insights and drive business decisions.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.rationale: This revised bullet point uses more descriptive language ('comprehensive data pipeline,' 'leveraging data preprocessing') and emphasizes the business impact of the candidate's work ('drive business decisions').

suggested_certifications: Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer
